details: The agent successfully navigated to the Wikipedia page and correctly extracted all co-laureates for the 3 most recent years. For 2024, it listed John J. Hopfield and Geoffrey Hinton (matching known facts). For 2023, it listed Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, and Anne L'Huillier (matching known facts). For 2025, it found newly added data (John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis) which was present on the live Wikipedia page at the time of the task. All co-laureates for each year were reported completely.
